items.title: Score Dad a laptop for Father’s Day while this Acer Chromebook with Google AI is down to $219 (All-time low)
items.summary:
As part of its ongoing Father’s Day sale, and as part of its Deals of the Day offers, Best Buy has listed Acer’s Chromebook 315 laptop with Google AI for $219 shipped. This is one of the latest budget-friendly models that hit the scene last year, and the variant highlighted here with 128GB storage typically goes for $379. Today’s deal takes $160 off its usual going rate to make it a lot easier on your wallet. We’ve seen the lower-end 4GB RAM and 64GB storage variant of this Chromebook go for less, but this is the lowest price we have tracked for this particular notebook. It may not be the fastest Chromebook out there, but it remains a reliable option for casual everyday use for, say, a student or an older adult who doesn’t need all the bells and whistles. Head below for more details.

more…

items.title: ENDS TODAY: Last chance at the 2026 Days of Play PS5 game and hardware deals
items.summary:
Just before its big summer State of Play games showcase, Sony launched its annual Days of Play sale and today is your last shot at it. All of the deals on DualSense controllers, $50 off Pulse Explore wireless earbuds, the rare discount on Ghost of Yotei, PS VR2, and more are all scheduled to end today. 

  • Amazon PlayStation Days of Play 2026 deals
  • Walmart PlayStation Days of Play 2026 deals
  • GameStop PlayStation Days of Play 2026 deals

PlayStation Days of Play 2026 – Last Chance

The 2026 PlayStation Days of Play sale is an expansive annual event that delivers notable discounts on official PlayStation hardware, as well as digital and physical games, plus more…and everything is set to wrap up today – June 10. 2026. While we do tend to see some of the deals carry through the week at some retailers, the best of them are likely to be gone by day’s end. 

PlayStation Days of Play hardware deals

Amazon PlayStation Days of Play 2026 hardware deals

Walmart PlayStation Days of Play 2026 hardware deals

GameStop PlayStation Days of Play 2026 deals

  • $100 off PlayStation VR2
  • $50 off Pulse Explore wireless earbuds
  • $40 off Pulse Elite wireless headset
  • $30 off DualSense Edge wireless controller
  • $30 off Access controller
  • Up to $20 off DualSense wireless controllers

PlayStation Days of Play game deals

Alongside the wide-ranging digital sale on the PlayStation Store, the clock is now ticking on the physical game deals at Amazon, Walmart, and others. From a rare discount on Ghost of Yotei to price drops on Death Stranding 2, Marvel’s Spider-Man 2, and loads of other PlayStation Studio games, if there’s anything you’re looking to add to your library this summer, now might be the time to do it:

  • Ghost of Yotei $49 (Reg. $70)
    • Also matched at Walmart
  • Astro Bot $39 (Reg. $60)
    • Also matched at Amazon 
  • Death Stranding 2: On The Beach $39 (Reg. $70)
  • Also matched at Walmart
  • Turok Trilogy Bundle $20 (Reg. $30)
  • Helldivers 2 $30 (Reg. $40)
  • Marvel’s Spider-Man 2 $29 (Reg. $70)
    • Also matched at Walmart
  • The Last of Us Part II Remastered $30 (Reg. $50)
  • Rise of the Ronin $30 (Reg. $70)
  • LEGO Horizon Adventures $20 (Reg. $40)
  • Horizon Zero Dawn Remastered $20 (Reg. $50)
  • Returnal $30 (Reg. $60)
  • The Nioh Collection $20 (Reg. $30+)
  • Demon’s Souls $30 (Reg. $40+)
  • Uncharted: Legacy of Thieves Collection$20 (Reg. $50)
  • Gran Turismo 7 $30 (Reg. $60+)
  • And even more…

Sony has also launched a giant digital game sale for those who prefer to side step the physical titles. There are over 2,100 games and DLC add-ons at up to 75% off on the PlayStation Store right now, and it too is scheduled to end today.

items.summary:
UGREEN’s new lineup of Nexode Air chargers has managed to stand out in the market with its compact design – and how! We took a look at the brand’s 65W Nexode Air ultra-mini USB-C GaN charger a few weeks back, and we’re now checking out the ultra-slim 45W Nexode Air model. This is easily the slimmest charger I have in my EDC right now, and it’s compact enough to slip into just about any of my pockets or bags. While it doesn’t quite match the 65W charging speeds of the other variant I tested earlier, I’ve found myself reaching for this slimmer one more often over the past few weeks simply because it’s so easy to carry around. Head below for a closer look and more details.
